raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tai Deena buhs Israëls
tas tresch ar teem Egiptereem
un Affireeem/ par Swehtifcha-
nu tai Semmē."
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGS Zebaoṭ
to Swehtihś/ un fazzihś: Siveh-
titi lat irr manni Laudis tee E-
gipteri / un tee Affireti mans
Rohku Darbs/ un Israëls man-
na eemantojama Teefa."
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XX. Nodalla.
Esaijam plikam un failam fastaiga: r. var
weenu Siḣmi/ ka teem Egiptereem un Moh-
xu Laudim peh; trim Gaddeem buhs plik-
keem un faileem no teem Affireeem Zeetu-
mā aiswesteem tapt: 3 / etc.

1. Anni Gaddā/ kad Tar-
tans us Asdodu nahze/
kad winnu Sargons
tas Rehninsch no Affirijas bij
fuhtijs/ kad winsch karroja prett
Asdodu/ un winzu uskehme."
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "2. Tai Laikā runnaja tas
KUNGS zaar Esatju Amoza
Deblu/ un fazzija : Eij/ un at-
raifi to Maifu no taweem Gur-
neem/ un nowelz tawas Kurpes
no tawahm Rahjahm. Un winsch
darrija ta/ un staigaja pliks un
baffahm Rahjahm."
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "3. Tad fazzija tas KUNGS:
Itt ka mans Kalps Esatjus pliks
un baffahni Rahjahm staiga/ par
treju Gaddu Siḣmi un Brihnu-
mu / pahr Egipti un Mohru
Semmi."
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Ta nodsihś tas Rehninsch
no Affirijas tohs Zeetuma Lau-
dis to Egiptern / un tohs ais-
weddamus Mohru Laudis/ jan-"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "nus un wezzus/ plikkus un baf-
tahm Rahjahm/ ar atsegту Raun-
num teem Egiptereem par
Raunu.

5. Un tee istrubzinafees un
taps Rauna to Mohru Lauschu
deht/ us ko tee patahwahś/ un
to Egiptern Deht/ ar ko tee lee-
ijahś."
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "6. Un tee Eedsihwotaji tan-
nis Gallāś tazzihs tai Deena.
Redsi/ Irrag schis muhtu Pa-
twerums/ kury mehg tezzejam
pehz Paliga/ ka mehs tsglahhti
ktuhtum no ta Rehnina no Affi-
rijas? Ka effam mehs tsglahhti."
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XXI. Nodalla.
Gluddinaschana no tahs gallejas Bohja,
Eeschanas ta Babeles Pilssjahta: 1. To
Eedomiteru: 11. un Araberu: 13.

1. Chi ur) ta Nasta
pahr to Tuksnest Juhra-
Malla. Itt ka Auki
no Deenas - Widdus Puttes
nahk/ kas twistu apgahsch/ ta'
nahks winsh no Tuksnetes/ no
weenas breefmigas Senunes."
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "2. Weena gruhta Parahdi-
schana irr man finnama darrita.
Weens Wittgajs nahk prett oh-
tru/ weens Pohstitajs prett oh-
tru. Nahz us angschu Elam /
apstahj winnu Meedija/ es lik-
tchu wiffas winna Ropuhfscha-
nas mittetees."
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "3. Tadeht irr manni Gurni
pilli Sabvo / Behdas irr man
usgahjuschas/ ka Behdas wee-
nas Seewas/ kas dseinde/ es
lohfolyś"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
